---
listing:
  contents: "*/*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  template: ../assets/listings/news-listing-grid.ejs.md
  fields: [title, date, description, categories, path]
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false
  exclude:
    draft: true
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-header}

::: {.header-text}
::: {.header-title}
NEWS
:::

::: {.header-subtitle}
Updates and announcements from the CALM Lab.
:::
:::

:::
